name: AbstractGraph
javadoc:
/**
 * A skeletal implementation of the <tt>Graph</tt> interface, to minimize the
 * effort required to implement graph interfaces. This implementation is
 * applicable to both: directed graphs and undirected graphs.
 *
 * @author Barak Naveh
 * @see Graph
 * @see DirectedGraph
 * @see UndirectedGraph
 */

members.name: AbstractGraph
containsEdge
removeAllEdges
removeAllEdges
removeAllVertices
toString
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Returns a string of the parenthesized pair (V, E) representing this
 * G=(V,E) graph. 'V' is the string representation of the vertex set, and
 * 'E' is the string representation of the edge set.
 *
 * @return a string representation of this graph.
 */

tags.description: a string representation of this graph.

members.name: assertVertexExist
members.javadoc: /** * Ensures that the specified vertex exists in this graph, or else throws * exception. * * @param v vertex * * @return true if this assertion holds. * * @throws NullPointerException if specified vertex is null. * @throws IllegalArgumentException if specified vertex does not exist in * this graph. */

tags.description: true if specified vertex exists in this graph.

tags.name: IllegalArgumentException
tags.content: if specified vertex does not exist in this graph.
tags.description: if specified vertex does not exist in this graph.

members.name: removeAllEdges
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Removes all the edges in this graph that are also contained in the
 * specified edge array. After this call returns, this graph will contain no
 * edges in common with the specified edges. This method will invoke the
 * {@link Graph#removeEdge(Object)} method.
 *
 * @param edges edges to be removed from this graph.
 *
 * @return <tt>true</tt> if this graph changed as a result of the call.
 *
 * @see Graph#removeEdge(Object)
 * @see Graph#containsEdge(Object)
 */

tags.name: edges
tags.content: edges to be removed from this graph.
tags.description: edges to be removed from this graph, not null

tags.content: if this graph changed as a result of the call.
tags.description: true if this graph changed as a result of the call.

members.name: toStringFromSets
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Helper for subclass implementations of toString( ).
 *
 * @param vertexSet the vertex set V to be printed
 * @param edgeSet the edge set E to be printed
 * @param directed true to use parens for each edge (representing directed);
 * false to use curly braces (representing undirected)
 *
 * @return a string representation of (V,E)
 */

tags.name: vertexSet
tags.content: the vertex set V to be printed
tags.description: the vertex set V to be printed

tags.name: edgeSet
tags.content: the edge set E to be printed
tags.description: the edge set E to be printed

tags.name: directed
tags.content: true to use parens for each edge (representing directed); false to use curly braces (representing undirected)
tags.description: true to use parens for each edge (representing directed); false to use curly braces (representing undirected)

members.name: hashCode
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Returns a hash code value for this graph. The hash code of a graph is
 * defined to be the sum of the hash codes of vertices and edges in the
 * graph. It is also based on graph topology and edges weights.
 *
 * @return the hash code value this graph
 *
 * @see Object#hashCode()
 */

tags.description: the hash code value for this graph.

members.name: equals
members.javadoc: /** * Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this graph. Returns * true if the given object is also a graph, the two graphs are * instances of the same graph class, have identical vertices and edges sets * with the same weights. * * @param obj object to be compared for equality with this graph * * @return true if the specified object is equal to this graph * * @see Object#equals(Object) */

tags.name: obj
tags.content: object to be compared for equality with this graph
tags.description: object to be compared for equality with this graph

tags.content: if the specified object is equal to this graph
tags.description: true if some other object is equal to this graph.
